title: Makefile: preserve entrypoint_amd64 and .gz in clean target
body:
The entrypoint_amd64.gz file is committed to the repository (built with native assembler, 362 bytes) and should not be deleted by 'make clean'. Also preserve the entrypoint_amd64 binary to prevent unnecessary rebuilds.

Only delete the other architecture binaries and .gz files which are pure build artifacts.

This prevents unnecessary rebuilds and git diffs after make clean.
